case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. INGRID MARIBEL ESCOBAR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-12-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, INGRID MARIBEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,873.43 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, INGRID MARIBEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT INGRID MARIBEL ESCOBAR DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
